candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; matches Total Revenue values and is standard naming.
Duplicate of Revenues with identical values; kept as secondary label in case of label changes over time.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used for total revenue.
Interest income is financial income, not operating revenue.
Financial income bucket, not operating revenue.
Tax expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the year
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Incl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minorities, not revenue.
Total comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Revenues and Total Revenue are identical; using both as a priority list for REVT per instructions.

candidates.why: Direct cost of materials and consumables; best proxy for cost of goods sold.
Includes company-wide personnel costs, part of which may be overhead; not strictly COGS.
Depreciation/amortization, not direct production cost per PROF definition.
Broad operating expense bucket, more SG&A-like than direct COGS.
Explicit SG&A, not COGS.
Overhead-type cost, not direct COGS.
Additional operating overhead, not primary COGS.
Financing-related, not production COGS.
Financial expense, not COGS.
Mixed income/expense line, not direct cost of sales.
Financial expense, not COGS.
Supplemental rental disclosure, overhead not COGS.
R&D expense, not cost of goods sold.
Non-recurring item, not recurring COGS.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not the period’s expense.
Liability account, not COGS itself.

variables.notes: Selected the main production input cost line as COGS; inventory change is not separately mapped per PROF spec.

candidates.why: Major operating overhead bucket; good SG&A component.
Explicit SG&A line, though currently empty; include per hierarchy rules.
Additional operating overhead; also SG&A in nature.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Amortization (D&A), which should be excluded from SG&A mapping per instructions.

variables.notes: Includes explicit SG&A line plus main operating overhead buckets; excludes amortization lines per rule to omit D&A from XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense disclosure; matches XRD definition.

variables.notes: Company reports R&D only as a supplemental line; mapped directly to XRD.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line item; should be first priority for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities, a component of total interest expense; include as secondary label.
Represents profit share to minorities, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; tertiary option if main lines are missing.
Balance sheet liability, not period interest expense.
Derivative position, not interest expense line.
Accrued interest liability, not the P&L expense itself.
Debt balance, not interest expense.
Interest-free liabilities, irrelevant for interest expense.
Equity for minorities, not interest.
Equity for minorities, not interest.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provides a priority list of P&L interest expense lines; balance sheet interest-bearing items are excluded as they are not expenses.

candidates.row_label: Impairment of Equity Investments and Loan
candidates.why: Impairment charge, not an equity balance.
Income attribution line, not the equity balance sheet amount.
Component of equity but not total equity attributable to owners.
Total equity attributable to parent shareholders; ideal BE line that excludes minorities.
Includes non-controlling interests; only used if owner equity line is absent, which is not the case here.

variables.notes: Uses equity attributable to parent shareholders, which excludes non-controlling interests as required for BE.

candidates.why: Income statement share of profit to minorities, not the balance sheet interest itself.
Balance sheet carrying amount of non-controlling interests; ideal for MIB.
Alternate label for the same non-controlling interests; would be duplicative if both selected.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not the equity balance.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet non-controlling interests line as MIB; excluded the duplicate-labelled Minority Interest to avoid double counting.
